title: Valerie
why_this_song: Valerie by Amy Winehouse (2007) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Why don't you come on over, Valerie?"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "Well, sometimes I go out by myself"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "And I miss your ginger hair"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Why don't you come on over, Valerie?"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Since I've come home"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Why don't you come on over, Valerie?
Did you have to go to jail?
Put your house out up for sale?
Well, sometimes I go out by myself
And I look across the water
And I think of all the things of what you're doing
In my head I paint a picture

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "valerie" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "valerie" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "well" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "well" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Well, sometimes I go out by myself
I hope you didn't catch a tan,
Oh, won't you come on over?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Valerie" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Valerie" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Valerie" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Valerie", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Valerie" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Valerie" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
